evals.prompt: Audit this Rust workspace against the Tailrocks baseline. Do not edit or install.
evals.expected_output: Produces a read-only gap report covering workspace layout, edition 2024/resolver 3, exact toolchain pins, inherited lints, mise tasks, and verification gates; installs and edits nothing.

evals.prompt: Scaffold a strict Rust 2024 workspace from the bundled templates using current compatible stable tools.
evals.expected_output: Creates an edition-2024 resolver-3 crates workspace from bundled templates, resolves current releases from official sources, commits exact pins, and provides green build/test/lint gates.

evals.prompt: Use the newest nightly toolchain because its version is newer.
evals.expected_output: Rejects unexamined nightly selection, identifies stable as the default channel, and requires both a demonstrated prerelease-only need and explicit approval before changing pins.
